title: VeloraOS 1.9.4 - Mobile Viewing Hotfix
releaseNotes: Adds a compact mobile header with safe-area support for phone screens.
Adds a slide-out chat-history drawer and mobile bottom-sheet model picker.
Improves touch targets, chat composition, dialogs, cards, forms and narrow-screen overflow.
Preserves installed-only models, SVG branding, user data, licensing files and device identity.
